protein_name: Integrin alpha-V/beta-5 (ITGAV:ITGB5) is a receptor for fibronectin. It recognizes the sequence R-G-D in its ligand. (Microbial infection) Integrin ITGAV:ITGB5 acts as a receptor for adenovirus type C. Belongs to the integrin beta chain family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
